note: AUD5 fix for finding F-08 (docs/novakai/audit/04-findings.md). SCOPE: test-authoring — the AUD3-missing deny tests ARE the fix (T5). The CI half of the finding was closed by F-06: spec-gate.yml consumes spec:test:all, which contains tooling-map.test.mjs, so the tooling-map chain (determinism, freshness, validate, lint, coverage) now runs in CI by construction.

intent.problem: AUD3 T5: tooling-map.test.mjs was ALLOW-only — the promised 'unmapped module / dangling %% src -> exit 1' was never exercised, so a mutation disabling tooling-coverage's failure would pass everything; and the whole chain ran in no CI job.
intent.approach: three CLI deny fixtures in tooling-map.test.mjs: an unmapped load-bearing module -> exit 1 (UNMAPPED), a %% src to a nonexistent file -> exit 1 (DANGLING), a %% src whose #symbol is not defined -> exit 1 (SYMBOL). CI coverage arrived via F-06 (spec:test:all).
intent.rationale: the deny fixtures kill the T5 mutation class; asserting the exact problem class in stdout pins WHICH deny fired, not just that something failed.
